ques: Look up the most recent papers related to 'cs.CL', select one and show its abstract.
answer: Selected the most recent cs.CL paper, "Real-Time Voice AI Hears but Does Not Listen" (arXiv:2606.26083, submitted 24 Jun 2026, by Martijn Bartelds, Federico Bianchi, James Zou). Its abstract reports that four leading real-time voice AI systems (OpenAI GPT Realtime 2, Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, Alibaba Qwen3.5 Omni Plus/Flash) act on the literal words while ignoring vocal delivery (distress, fear, sarcasm) even when they can perceive it — a disconnect the authors call the "emotional intelligence gap" of voice AI.
